step.name: model-entities-and-relationships
step.action: Translate entities to tables. Identify FKs, lookup tables, junction tables. Pick PKs (prefer UUID v7 or BIGINT identity).

step.name: author-ddl-with-constraints
step.action: Emit CREATE TABLE statements. Every FK + UNIQUE + NOT NULL + CHECK declared in DDL.

step.name: validate-3nf-and-justify-denormalization
step.action: Walk each table: are all non-key columns dependent on the whole PK? If denormalized, document the query/latency that justifies it.

step.name: plan-indexes-from-workload
step.action: Run EXPLAIN against representative queries. Add only indexes the plan demands. Document each index → query mapping.
step.decision-gate: If >2 indexes per table on average, re-examine the workload — likely over-indexed.

step.name: author-migration-plan
step.action: Pick expand-only / expand-then-contract / new-schema strategy. Sequence DDL statements; rollback for each.

step.name: review-and-sign-off
step.action: Open PR with schema spec + ERD + migration plan. DB owner + tech lead review.
